scripts.build: bun run build:pkgs; bun run build:apps
scripts.build:pkgs: bun run --filter @quester/schema build; bun run --filter @quester/nodes build; bun run --filter @quester/engine build; bun run --filter @quester/cli build
scripts.build:apps: bun run --filter @quester/web build; bun run --filter @quester/docs build; bun run --filter @quester/desktop build
scripts.test: bun run --filter @quester/schema test; bun run --filter @quester/nodes test; bun run --filter @quester/engine test; bun run --filter @quester/cli test; bun run --filter @quester/desktop test
scripts.typecheck: bun run --filter @quester/schema typecheck; bun run --filter @quester/nodes typecheck; bun run --filter @quester/engine typecheck; bun run --filter @quester/cli typecheck; bun run --filter @quester/desktop typecheck
scripts.test:coverage: bun run --filter @quester/schema test -- --coverage; bun run --filter @quester/nodes test -- --coverage; bun run --filter @quester/engine test -- --coverage; bun run --filter @quester/cli test -- --coverage; bun run --filter @quester/desktop test -- --coverage
